summary:
NewStrategyFable5's v7.0 book is the end-state of a heavily pre-registered research program. The lineage (docs/VERSION_HISTORY.md) runs V1 v13-REBAL (63.4%/19.0% Duka) -> V2 "tilt" (LP certificate: 24/24 positive quarters provably infeasible) -> V3.x -> V3.3 (82.3%/26.3% IC-cost-reconciled) -> the feed-divergence crisis (Duka 82% vs IC ~63-67% in the 8-sleeve MT5 EA) -> V4 IC-native rebuild (core5, equal-weight 1/N, noliq, R=8, quarterly rebalance worth ~26-32pp CAGR) -> V4-USTEC (USA500->USTEC swap, 88%/16.6% real-tick) -> V6 (core7 = BOOK_XAU, BOOK_USTEC, S5_JPY, S1_ETH, ZC_EG, S6_OPEXUSD, BTC_REP; band-harvest k=2.5; real-tick 84.5%/19.6% @ R8) -> V7.0. Exactly four levers reached V7.0, each tested against pre-committed bars (docs/v7/DASHBOARD.html "decision trail" + underlying docs): (1) ADOPTED concentration-band re-split BAND_SYM_25 replacing the calendar quarter (re-split when any slot share of book equity > 0.25 or < W/1.75 ~= 0.0816, daily check, >=5-day min gap) — passed all five pre-registered G-BANDREBAL gates (+9.38pp CAGR at lower DD with the shipped k=2.5 harvest ACTIVE, which the band subsumes: harvest fires 0 of 31 triggers); (2) ADOPTED H9 delta-resize at re-splits (same-sign resize instead of close-all+reopen; V4-certified +1.5pp worst-feed; EA reconciliation 98.9% of held-and-active resizes via the delta path, 266 delta actions); (3) DECLINED debounce-3 chaos rule (+1.4pp on the close-mark panel but −6.6pp on tick — established the binding lesson "the Python close-mark panel MISLEADS on anything schedule-affecting; trust the tick"); (4) ADOPTED leverage R11->R10, rule-picked on the MT5 real-tick R-frontier (reports _32–_37, measured grid R in {5,8,10,12,15,20}): the band caps the high-R DD explosion (V6 blew to ~37% eqDD at R15/20, V7 holds ~26%), R12 is the CAGR knee (99.8% flat beyond), and R10 is the Sharpe peak (2.03) at the lowest Maximal eqDD (20.9%) of the high-R points. R11 was never on the measured tick grid; V8_RELEVER_POLICY later confirms R10->R11 tick is ~+1.9pp CAGR for ~+1.8pp crisis tail ("barely worth the keystroke") and R10->R12 only +3.7pp (the linear panel's +19.8pp is a fantasy — real vol-target caps saturate above R10).

Every extension after V7.0 was stress-tested and rejected with cause, so V7.0 is declared the frontier. (a) OVERLAY RING (C2 CPI-combo4 + C3 NFP-fade + F1 USTEC open-drive + F5 BTC-ORB, from the H5/H6 pre-registered hunts): the streams are real (all four passed the G7-prime overlay gate; the min-lot "infeasible" verdict of CANDIDATE_CONFIG rev1 was a measurement artifact corrected in OVERLAY_RESCUE.md, +5.86pp unlevered at lower DD; V7.2 said GO at +6.9pp @ R10), but the V7.5 from-scratch redesign (3 tracks + twice-audited red-team) priced the overlay's own FUNDING for the first time: single-account coupling is banned (a EUR128 perturbation chaotically shifted core rebalance timing by −EUR59k), a separate account parks cash out of a ~100%/yr core at a compounded drag of ~1.43pp per phi-point, giving breakeven forward core CAGR ~= 44-47% — BELOW the 50% goal floor. Verdict: "insurance, not CAGR at EUR10k"; m=0 (100% core) is a legitimate first-class outcome; ring rejected as a CAGR extension. The redesign also found the C2 CPI calendar has look-ahead (61 of 71 scheduled dates selected ex-post on realized reaction; 2020: 2 of 12 kept) and dropped F5 structurally (ESMA 2x crypto margin = 53% of worst-day peak, drag 2.1pp*m vs contribution 0.46pp*m). (b) VIX TAIL HEDGE (V7.4a always-on, V7.4b term-structure-conditional): both adversarially adjudicated GATE FAIL against the pre-registered bar (>=5pp COVID rel-DD cut at calm cost <=4pp CAGR/yr): always-on eligible budgets deliver +0.97/+1.94/+2.92pp (tick bound <=~4.4-4.9pp at b=3); conditional peaks at +4.913pp (0.087pp short) because backwardation is confirmation, not anticipation (signal flips 2020-02-24, three days after the Feb-19 tick peak, front already +30.6%; Feb-2026 never fires). Bleed: long front-VX loses median −9.4%/mo in contango, −78%/yr all-in with IC costs. V7.4 CLOSED; only non-rebalanced crisis-tranche/option structures go to the backlog. (c) ENERGY CARRIER (V7.6): S6_OPEXUSD is the real, H8-confirmed diluter target (LOO drop = +8.86pp CAGR but DD-rel worsens to 20.65% > 18.84%, so naked drop is FORBIDDEN; replace-only). The frozen 15-cell tsmom grid ({XBR,XTI,XNG} x L{20,40,60,120,250}) scored 0/15 on G1, 0/15 on BH-FDR (best p=0.0346 vs threshold 0.0067); the skeptic autopsy shows XBRUSD:L20 (Sharpe 0.614) is a one-event 2020 mirage (2020 = 78.8% of P&L; remove 2020 -> 0.194; ladder is a spike 0.61/0.33/−0.43/−0.18/0.25). KEEP S6; thesis PARKED, not falsified; R untouched. (d) EXTERNAL IMPORTS (FableMultiAssets2, H14/H15): H14 on the V6-era quarterly book banked crisis +4.00pp and seasonal +1.43pp matched-DD as core seats and rejected 5 of 7; H15 (all 7 position parquets byte-identical, md5-verified) re-tested on the V7.0 band book: all three pre-registered tests REJECT — crisis ADD INVERTS to −20.89pp raw / −23.40pp even matched-DD (H8 diluter mechanism confirmed out-of-family), carry-replaces-S6 −13.47pp, crisis-replaces-S6 +1.35pp misses its +3pp gate and is "plausibly 100% rebalance-schedule chaos, must not be re-litigated." crisis/seasonal PARKED as cadence/leverage-conditional; channel declared EXHAUSTED (2 evaluations, 10 book-level tests, 0 adoptions — a third pass is "p-hacking by installment"). V8_RELEVER_POLICY formally retired the +5.57pp crisis+seasonal number. (e) FM-1 INTRADAY FIX (V8.1): the single pre-registered V8 primary (8-cell intraday give-back interceptor on the touchable crypto pair) is the PRE-REGISTERED NULL: every cell loses −6.6 to −15.5pp CAGR at flat DD, all OOS halves negative, all CPCV medians negative, BH-FDR rejects none (p 0.97-0.999); skeptic confirmed via fixed-schedule ablation (frozen-schedule deltas [−11.81,−3.66]pp, all negative, >=3.6x the ~1.0pp chaos band). FM-1 retired to accepted-structural; the EUR10k book is declared at its structural ceiling.

The multiple-testing discipline is procedural, not a single DSR statistic: (1) docs/REGISTRY.md is the standing ledger — "Every strategy/parameter-family evaluated is logged here — including failures — to keep the multiple-testing burden honest"; (2) hunts count everything (H5: ~2,600 prescreens + 137 engine tests across 9 families -> 2 verified survivors -> 0 pass the funded-slot gate; H6: 360 prescreens + 35 engine tests across 5 families -> 2 ADDs; target honest FDR <= ~10%, "zero survivors is an acceptable answer"); (3) the house selection discount is Benjamini–Hochberg FDR at q=10% over a frozen pre-registered grid with block-bootstrap p-values (V7.6: 15 cells, 20-day circular block, N=5000, seed 76, one-sided H0 Sharpe<=0; V8.1: 8 cells, block=21, B=5000; v7.5.x batch protocol: BH q=10%, min 40 events, fresh post-2025 data only), plus CPCV MEDIAN gates (never argmax), plateau rules (params +-30% within 25% of peak), worst-offset DD as the reported DD, single-shot gates with smallest-passing selection rules and explicit no-grid-interpolation / no-seat-shopping clauses, skeptic red-teams with kill authority that recompute every load-bearing number with independently written code, and the tick arbiter for anything schedule- or sizing-affecting. The only DSR figure anywhere is FableMultiAssets2's own marginal design-DSR 0.33–0.55, cited in H15 to argue that 0-for-10 book-level import tests was the EXPECTED outcome. The honesty floor is stated everywhere: 2020-25 is fully mined (holdout consumed); two-halves DEV 2020-22 / HOLD 2023-25 is only an in-sample robustness proxy; live 2026H2+ is the only clean OOS and "the demo is the experiment."
key_facts: V7.0 config: core7 {BOOK_XAU, BOOK_USTEC, S5_JPY, S1_ETH, ZC_EG, S6_OPEXUSD, BTC_REP}, equal-capital 1/7, per-sleeve vol-targeting, BAND_SYM_25 re-split (share>0.25 or <W/1.75~=0.0816, daily, >=5-day gap; k=2.5 harvest retained as inert guard), H9 delta-resize, R=10, EUR10k IC Markets EU Raw ESMA. EA: mt5/ea/PortfolioV7.mq5, magic base 360000, preset mt5/presets/V7_CORE7BAND_R10_IC.set (docs/v7/PERFORMANCE.md:1-8, GBANDREBAL_RESULTS.md:115-125).

LEVER 1 BAND_SYM_25 (ADOPTED): pre-registered gates in GBANDREBAL_PROTOCOL.md — T2 decisive: gain must be >=+3pp CAGR at <=V6 DD with the k=2.5 harvest ACTIVE; result +9.38pp (89.7%/15.70% bd/19.44% tick vs V6 80.3%/17.31%/20.74%), harvest fires 0/31 (band subsumes it). T3 plateau: up-threshold 0.20->82.0, 0.22->79.5, 0.25->89.7, 0.28->90.6, 0.30->91.5% CAGR (min=87% of peak, gate >=75%) BUT tick DD breaches 20% at 0.28/0.30 (20.74%) -> 0.25 is the WIDEST band satisfying <20% tick DD (constraint-picked, not tuned; ship at up<=0.25 strictly). T4 worst-offset tick DD 19.44% (0.56pp headroom). T5 DEV 83.3%/15.7, HOLD 96.4%/11.8; CPCV 6 blocks/k=2/5-bd embargo/15 folds: median 85.9%/14.2%, 15/15 clear goal. T1 reproduced H8 T6 byte-for-byte (GBANDREBAL_RESULTS.md).

LEVER 2 H9 delta-resize (ADOPTED): same-sign ADD/REDUCE to target at re-splits instead of close-all+reopen (reversals still close+reopen); certified in the V4 cost search at +1.5pp worst-feed (~EUR3.3k/boundary refund); reconciliation: 266 same-sign delta actions, 98.9% of held-and-active resizes use the delta path (docs/v7/PERFORMANCE.md:216-218, HYPOTHESES.md H9).

LEVER 3 debounce-3 chaos rule (DECLINED): +1.4pp on the Python close-mark panel, −6.6pp on tick -> 'schedule changes are themselves chaotic; chaos can't be tuned away'; binding lesson: close-mark panel is UNRELIABLE for schedule-affecting changes, trust the tick (docs/v7/research/ROADMAP.md:4-6, V75_CHARTER.md:28-29, DASHBOARD.html:143).

LEVER 4 R11->R10 (ADOPTED, rule-picked): MT5 real-tick R-frontier (reports _32-_37) R5 70.9%/17.0%M/20.9%R; R8 86.5%/21.2%/30.4%; R10 96.1%/20.9%/35.6% Sharpe 2.03 ML190%; R12 99.8%/21.4%/39.2%; R15 99.8%/25.8%/39.7%; R20 99.6%/26.3%/39.3%. R12 = CAGR knee; R10 = Sharpe peak at lowest high-R Maximal DD; band caps high-R DD (V6 R15/20 ~37% vs V7 ~26%). R11 not on the measured grid; V8_RELEVER_POLICY: R10->R11 ~ +1.9pp CAGR for +1.8pp crisis tail; tick CAGR saturates ~99.8% by R12 (docs/v7/PERFORMANCE.md:56-81, docs/v8/research/V8_RELEVER_POLICY.md:109-129).

Maximal vs Relative DD (methodology, added 2026-07-09): MT5 Equity DD Maximal (EUR-worst, late, ~R-invariant 17-26%) vs Relative (%-worst = COVID crisis tail, early, scales sharply with R: R5 20.9% -> R10 35.6% -> R12+ ~39%). The Relative is the account-survival number and must be reported first-class; V7.0 accepted 35.6% <= user's 40% ceiling; NOT a margin event (ML 315%->1690% through Mar-2020) (docs/VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY.md:73-88, V71_CRISIS_TAIL.md).

V7.1 crisis-tail record: KEEP R10, ACCEPT 35.6%. R10->R8 costs −29.7pp CAGR to cut 5.2pp of tail (trade user already declined); crisis sleeve does NOT fix COVID at EUR10k (2020 clear-frac 0.0339 — gold min-lot EUR1,751 > 2020 slot EUR1,250-1,917; ideal uncalled book gives IDENTICAL 11.23% COVID relDD = zero convexity at trough, the −1.51pp is pure 1/8 cash dilution) but is a legitimate later/large-account hedge (Aug-24 −4.68pp, maximal-EUR −EUR11,898); tail self-cures as account compounds; do NOT spend Fable on a leading breaker (V71_CRISIS_TAIL.md).

H8 rebalance science (the 32pp question): quarterly-vs-none = +26.36pp CAGR / +7.63pp bd DD (none 53.5%/24.9%bd/33.7%tick -> quarterly 79.9%/17.3%/20.7%). M1 Gaussian vol-pumping confirmed-but-minor (+4.75pp = 18%); M2 winner-concentration DD control fully structural (GBM reproduces 229-244% of DD gap; ZC_EG compounds to 53.1% of book without re-split) but CONDITIONAL on slot-equity sizing (flips to −7.31pp under fixed-notional); M3 ordering REFUTED (all 600 block-shuffles keep positive gap; ordering −0.01pp central, worst-case <=+5.7pp); residual +21.62pp = non-Gaussian fat-tail harvest. Structural share conservatively 78%. Carriers: BOOK_XAU −4.72, S5_JPY −4.35, ZC_EG −2.86, USTEC −1.50; diluters: S6 +9.53, BTC_REP +3.93, S1_ETH +3.26. Re-split is LOAD-BEARING risk control at R8+ (H8_REBALANCE_SCIENCE.md).

REJECTED post-V7.0 #1 overlay ring: V7.5 funding identity — drag ~= (1+g)*4*g_q/(1+g_q) per phi-point = 1.43pp/phi-pt at panel g=108.6%, 1.21 at tick 96.1%, 0.58 at 50%; NET matrix at m=3: −5.3pp at panel g, −4.2 at tick g, −0.5 at 50%, breakeven forward core CAGR ~=44-47% < the 50% goal floor -> 'insurance, not a return enhancer'; m=0 legitimate. Separate account forced by chaos fact EUR128 -> −EUR59k (single-account coupling banned); sync only at core quarter-close; phi*=5.9% (~EUR590 overlay account at m=3). N-1 defect: CPI arrays are 61-of-71 scheduled dates selected ex-post on realized reaction (2020: 2 of 12) = look-ahead for pre-print legs. F5 BTC-ORB dropped structurally (ESMA 2x: EUR190.4 margin per EUR381 notional = 53% of worst-day margin peak; needs forward core CAGR <~26% to pay). Kill-or-cure gates: combined panel DD <=18.84, tick eqDD <=20.9, fail => m=0 (V75_DESIGN.md, MORNING_BRIEFING.md, DASHBOARD.html:151).

REJECTED post-V7.0 #2 VIX tail hedge (V7.4 CLOSED): pre-registered bar = some budget b in {1,2,3,5}%/yr with calm cost <=4pp delivering >=5pp COVID rel-DD improvement, no new negY, Aug-24/Feb-26 not worsened, smallest-passing-b rule. V7.4a always-on: eligible b {1,2,3} -> +0.97/+1.94/+2.92pp (b=5 ineligible, 6.33pp cost); tick bound b=3 <= ~4.4-4.9pp. FAIL. V7.4b conditional (VIX3M−VIX<=0 at t−1, h grid verbatim): +0.967/+1.948/+2.927/+4.913pp — max 0.087pp short of the bar; off-grid pass point h=0.0653 forbidden (no-mining); backwardation = confirmation not anticipation (flip 2020-02-24, 3 days after Feb-19 tick peak, front already +30.6%; captures 83.6% of Sigma-r; Feb-2026: never fires, contango throughout). Bleed: median −9.4%/mo contango, all-in −78%/yr median / −55% mean with IC costs; convexity lives in 8 backwardation months (+51%/mo). Both adjudications adversarial (independent recomputation, exact matches). Backlog survivor only: non-rebalanced crisis-tranches / 2M-cm30 leg / listed VIX options — each needs a NEW pre-registration (V74_VIX_GATE.md, V74B_CONDITIONAL_GATE.md, V74_GATE_RESULTS.md). IC has no COVID-era VIX data (dated CFDs from 2024-25 only; VXX.NYSE stub ends 2019-01) — banked: CBOE 2013-2026 VX dataset + IC calibration (spread 0.482%/side charged, 0.264% measured).

REJECTED post-V7.0 #3 energy carrier (V7.6): thesis = replace diluter S6 with high-vol ~0-corr energy tsmom carrier. LOO: drop-S6 = +8.86pp CAGR but DD-rel 20.65% > 18.84% -> naked drop FORBIDDEN, replace-only. Frozen grid 15 cells tsmom (donchian55 & mr5z pre-killed family-level; XPT killed rho-gold 0.55; XAG graveyard). Result 0/15 G1 (only XBRUSD:L20 Sharpe 0.614 but H2 = −0.070), 15/15 G2 distinctness (moot), 0/15 G3 plateau (Brent ladder is a spike 0.61/0.33/−0.43/−0.18/0.25), 0/15 BH (best p 0.0346 > 0.0067). Skeptic: 2020 alone = 78.8% of XBR:L20 P&L (2020+2022 = 94.4%); remove-2020 Sharpe 0.194; calm years blended +0.072. KEEP S6; thesis PARKED (revisit only with live 2026H2+ accumulation or pre-2020 extension); R NOT touched (V76_DIAGNOSTIC.md, V76_CARRIER_HUNT.md, V76_CARRIER_RESULTS.md).

REJECTED post-V7.0 #4 external imports (H14/H15): H14 vs V6-quarterly: crisis +4.00pp matched-DD (8x the +0.5pp gate; Aug-24 +13.7% vs V6 −11.1%), seasonal +1.43pp (marginal +1.57 after crisis) banked as seats; joint 9-stream 86.13%/17.13% (+5.57pp) at lambda~=1.31. Rejects: meanrev (T2 −4.36pp; FX-reversion graveyard reconciled — slow L=60 leg is NOT cost-dead, commission drag only 0.021 Sharpe, but weakest per unit capital), carry_breakout (+0.42pp < +0.5 gate), intraday (rho 0.87 to F1 on shared days; F1 dominates), crypto_smart (HOLD 0.30), trend_v2 (HOLD 0.15, 31.6% DD). H15 vs V7.0 band unlevered: T-A crisis ADD −20.89pp raw / −23.40pp matched-DD (INVERTED; feasibility not the blocker — economics are); T-B1 carry-replaces-S6 −13.47pp; T-B2 crisis-replaces-S6 +1.35pp < +3pp gate, 'plausibly 100% schedule chaos', banned from re-litigation. crisis/seasonal PARKED cadence/leverage-conditional (seasonal also feed-sensitive: Duka Sharpe 1.07->0.40); channel EXHAUSTED: 2 evaluations, 10 book-level tests, 0 adoptions; their design-DSR 0.33-0.55 makes 0-for-10 the expected outcome (H14_FABLE_RESULTS.md, H15_FABLE2_IMPORT.md, H15_FABLE2_RESULTS.md).

REJECTED post-V7.0 #5 FM-1 intraday fix (V8.1 pre-registered NULL): grid H{2,4}h x p{90,95} x k{0,0.5} = 8 cells on touchable S1_ETH+BTC_REP only (USTEC = dominant spike-day loser −785bp/day but uncuttable carrier, LOO −8.25pp/+7.91pp). Gate dCAGR >= +2.0pp at DD <= baseline: EVERY cell −6.6 to −15.5pp; OOS-H2 all negative (−13 to −28); CPCV medians all negative; BH-FDR p 0.97-0.999. Mechanism: trigger selects crypto continuation-UP days (removed post-H segments sum POSITIVE); 2022Q4 unchanged −3.19% in all 8. Skeptic NULL_CONFIRMED ROBUST: fixed-schedule ablation dCAGR in [−11.81,−3.66] all negative, >=3.6x the ~1.0pp rebalance-chaos band. FM-1 retired to accepted-structural; book at structural ceiling; tick gate correctly NOT spent on a panel FAIL (docs/v8/research/V8_1_RESULTS.md).

V8 relever policy (post-V7.0 closures): crisis/seasonal insurance DEAD on band book (+5.57pp RETIRED — the band already supplies crisis's DD-reduction, so the DD channel does not exist; crisis raises raw DD 18.84->19.25); profit-ring-fence/HWM-delever DEAD (0/29 configs dominate R10; 27/29 'just a mattress'; band Sharpe declines with R so no convexity); straight re-lever NOT a free lunch (tick saturates; ~1:1 CAGR-per-crisis-tail-pp at R12); recommendation SHIP R10 UNCHANGED (m=0). Min-lot never binds the R lever (higher R = more feasible) (docs/v8/research/V8_RELEVER_POLICY.md).

Multiple-testing ledger: docs/REGISTRY.md preamble = 'Every strategy/parameter-family evaluated is logged here — including failures — to keep the multiple-testing burden honest' (21 numbered research probes, portfolio evolution, retractions incl. the ORB same-bar-lookahead retraction Sharpe 1.11->0.36). Hunt counts: H5 ~2,600 prescreens + 137 engine tests, 9 families, 5 printed ADDs -> 2 verified -> 0 pass funded-slot G7; H6 360 prescreens + 35 engine tests, 5 families -> 2 ADDs; date-validation counts FOMC 46/47, CPI 61/71, NFP 69/71. HUNT_PROTOCOL.md honesty rule 3: 'Count EVERYTHING you tried... Multiplicity is part of the result.' House FDR = Benjamini-Hochberg q=10% over frozen grids with block-bootstrap p-values (V7.6: 20d circular block N=5000 seed 76 m=15; V8.1: block=21 B=5000 m=8; v7.5.x batch: q=10%, min 40 events, post-2025 data only). CPCV MEDIAN gates; plateau +-30% within 25% of peak; worst-offset DD reported; single-shot smallest-passing selection; no grid interpolation; no seat-shopping (one candidate at a time in pre-committed priority). No formal in-house DSR statistic — the only DSR number is FableMA2's design-DSR 0.33-0.55 quoted in H15.

Pre-committed bars methodology (exact pattern): (1) write and freeze a pre-registration BEFORE any sim (grid, gates, FDR, selection rule, fallback ladder, kill criteria — e.g. V74_VIX_GATE.md 'pre-registered BEFORE any sim'; V76_CARRIER_HUNT.md 'written and frozen before any hunt run'); (2) reproduce the baseline to the euro before testing (108.5049%/18.84%/EUR956,197/nreb 42 reproduced exactly in H15, V7.4, V7.6, V8.1); (3) single-shot gates, no iterate-on-failure, deviations logged as amendments; (4) both-OOS-halves (2020-22 / 2023-25) must agree; (5) adversarial adjudication: every load-bearing number independently recomputed with independently-written code (V74_GATE_RESULTS.md exact-match tables); (6) skeptic red-team with kill authority; (7) panel nominates, MT5 real-tick decides anything schedule/sizing-affecting (debounce lesson); (8) negative result is the pre-registered default and 'a valid, publishable outcome'; (9) graveyard non-relitigation lists in every protocol; (10) fixed-schedule rebalance ablation added as mandatory chaos discriminator for any future band-book seat winner (H15 closure addendum).

Chaos facts (V7.1 study, core_rchaos.py/core_ensemble.py per ROADMAP status): rebalance timing is chaotically equity-sensitive — EUR128 perturbation -> −EUR59k outcome shift (reports _41/_43); tick-regen band ~±1.6%; debounce draw −6.6pp; chaos is bounded/survival-safe but not cheaply reducible at EUR10k -> ship R10, accept, pre-register the honest live band. Rebalance-chaos noise band ~1.0pp (V8.1 skeptic); quarterly-offset noise ±2-3pp CAGR / ±1-2pp DD (H8 T6 finding 1) — any smaller single-path cadence comparison is noise.

Documented graveyard (must NOT re-test; HYPOTHESES.md sec.2 + V8_ROADMAP.md sec.5): vol-targeting/DD-throttles/regime-riskoff/corr-triggers/sleeve-DD overlays ALL INVERT on this convergent book (−2 to −31pp; book is PAID for turbulence — top vol-quartile = best forward returns); gold Donchian selectivity (0/6 levers); FX carry baskets; cross-sectional FX RV (cost-dead at EUR10k, revisit >=EUR50k); silver ('metals-cluster mirage'); weight optimization any cadence (1/N wins OOS); regime-switching between configs; 24/24 quarters (LP infeasibility certificate, binding block {2021Q3,2022Q2,2022Q3,2022Q4}); gold share <=33% infeasible; VIX-LEVEL hedges; backward daily throttles; EUR10k overlays as CAGR; FableMA2 imports; energy carrier 1-event mirage; fx_zrev fast variants; and the full HUNT_PROTOCOL.md dead list.

Promising-but-untested / parked (documented): DISCOVERY_BACKLOG.md — G-CRYPTO-FUNDING (BTC 00:00-srv settlement drift, medium prior, needs >=7-min-after-maintenance entry), G-MOC-IMBALANCE (22:50-srv, medium), G-ENERGY-INTRADAY spread-only (white space), G-OVERLAY-C1 pre-FOMC (real edge, overlay-shaped, medium), G-CONVEXITY-OPTIONS (high-value, data-blocked), G-BANDREBAL (adopted into V7), G-DUALFEED 2nd feed for IC-only sleeves (medium, before real size), G-XSEC at >=EUR50k, G-RFRONTIER-V7 (high), G-REGIME-MONITOR (premium erodes if sleeve vol compresses / corr converges — first-order scales with avg sleeve variance minus portfolio variance), G-EA-RELIABILITY (medium-high). V7.5.x parked: C1 FOMC (n=46), F4 witching (dated-contract ban), F6 BTC settlement, US30 pre-open fade (Sharpe 0.77, 6/6 years+, below bar); F5 re-entry = structural condition ONLY. V7.4 backlog: crisis-tranche/option payoffs. V8 watch-list (forward-only, pre-registered): FM-2 S5_JPY rate-turn co-fall (evaluate on next independent rate turn, never calibrate to 2022), FM-6 COVID self-cure (first mature-book vol shock). Energy-tsmom thesis PARKED. V7.2 extended-history (2016-2020 book / 2008-2020 core-minus-crypto on Duka+crypto-exchange feeds) — plan exists (EXTENDED_HISTORY_PLAN.md) but reconciliation PAUSED mid-diagnosis: anchor gives 71%/44% vs real 108%/19% (MORNING_BRIEFING.md:80-81). crisis-REPLACE-S6 logged as dormant crisis-hedge option only (V8 sign-off Q6). H12 demo protocol pending, now with the 20d-block breach-probability convention (P[DD>30%] via stationary block bootstrap, 10k paths, 20-day blocks, reported close- AND worst-mark).

Doc contradictions (both sides preserved): (1) H14_FABLE_RESULTS.md sec.1 banked crisis/seasonal as full new_core_seats vs H15 superseding addendum marking them CADENCE-CONDITIONAL/PARKED (warning stamped into H14 itself). (2) CANDIDATE_CONFIG.md rev2 recommends C2cfg = V6+band+overlay-ring unlevered @R8 (95.87%/14.71%) — superseded by the final V7.0 (no overlay, R10) after V7.1/V7.5; rev1 (min-lot artifact) archived at docs/history/V7_CANDIDATE_CONFIG_rev1_min-lot-artifact_20260709.md. (3) negQ 0 (Python close-mark panel) vs 3/24 (deployable MT5 real-tick R10: 2020Q1 −21.8%, 2021Q3 −1.4%, 2022Q4 −6.3%) — methodology says the MT5 count is canonical. (4) 2020Q1 has THREE numbers: MT5 floating DD −35.6%, MT5 q/q close −21.8%, Python panel q/q +3.07% (V72_OVERLAY.md sec.3). (5) Panel-vs-tick: panel understates COVID rel-DD ~0.53x (18.84 vs 35.6) and is not decision-grade above R10 (rfrontier tick column anchored ONLY at R10; R12 panel overshoots +7.1pp).
architecture: V7.0 is a single cross-margined MT5 account running one EA (mt5/ea/PortfolioV7.mq5, magic base 360000) that implements 7 sleeves as virtual sub-accounts ('slots') with per-slot ledgers: BOOK_XAU (gold Donchian L/S ensemble + vol-adaptive night leg, netted book), BOOK_USTEC (200d-regime long + Monday effect, netted book), S5_JPY (USDJPY carry-trend, jpy_smart tiering), S1_ETH (crypto momentum, 200d regime + 20/60, financing-hurdle), ZC_EG (EURGBP multi-window z-reversion ensemble), S6_OPEXUSD (3-leg opex-week USD sleeve, aggregated into ONE slot with floor 0.08), BTC_REP (BTC hurdle momentum). Equal-capital 1/7 slots; per-sleeve vol-targeting where R enters as the linear vol-target scaler r_R = r_8*(R/8); R=10 live. Capital allocation control loop: the BAND_SYM_25 concentration-band re-split — at each UTC-day rollover compute slot shares (virtual balance + floating P&L); if any share > 0.25 or < (1/7)/1.75 ~= 0.0816, re-split the whole book to equal capital (min 5 days between re-splits, no calendar cadence); the legacy k=2.5 band-harvest check is retained but inert (0 fires in 6y). Re-splits and rebalances execute via H9 delta-resize (same-sign positions resized to target with boundary spread+commission refunded; reversals close+reopen). The Python research stack has three fidelity tiers: (1) the honest 1m engine (engine/backtest.py; IC-native per-fill spread, EUR3.25/side FX/metals commission, reconstructed server-midnight swaps validated against IC MT5 actuals, ESMA leverage, worst-mark DD) — 'source of truth' model; (2) the close-mark daily band panel (band_sim in mt5/reconcile/v72/combined.py over mt5/reconcile/h15/base_matrix.parquet = 7 honest-engine sleeve-return columns) — used for all post-V7.0 selection studies, reproducing 108.5049%/18.84%/EUR956,197/42 rebalances exactly as the entry gate of every study; (3) the MT5 real-tick Strategy Tester — the binding arbiter for anything schedule- or sizing-affecting (panel misleads: debounce-3 +1.4pp panel vs −6.6pp tick; panel-to-tick Rel-DD ratio ~1.889 anchored at R10 only). Research governance: hypotheses live in docs/v7/research/HYPOTHESES.md (risk register R1-R12 + H1-H13 hypothesis portfolio + graveyard); each workstream gets a frozen pre-registration doc (grid/gates/FDR/selection/fallbacks), a results/synthesis doc, and artifacts under mt5/reconcile/<study>/ (deterministic scripts + JSON); skeptic red-teams hold kill authority; docs/REGISTRY.md is the standing multiple-testing ledger and docs/VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY.md defines the 6-tier promotion battery (Tier 0 correctness/reconciliation, T1 in-sample, T2 OOS walk-forward+CPCV+holdout+both-feeds, T3 anti-overfit plateau/lag/placebo/cost-stress/offset-DD/1-over-N, T4 Monte-Carlo+stress incl. corr-spike rho=0.8 and tail-x2, T5 structural correlation/rotation; hard gates CAGR>50, DD<30, every year +, no keystone, WF+CPCV clear, MC p5>40%, P(DD>30)<5%).
how_to_run: Full validation battery: python mt5/reconcile/validate.py V7 (or 'V7 quick' to skip the Feb-2026 rig run) — per docs/VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY.md; add a version to REGISTRY in validate.py to validate a new config. Expected: 7/7 hard gates PASS for V7.0.

Post-V7.0 study baseline (mandatory reproduction gate before any experiment): import band_sim READ-ONLY from mt5/reconcile/v72/combined.py, run BAND_SYM_25 @ R10 on mt5/reconcile/h15/base_matrix.parquet -> must reproduce CAGR 108.5049% / DD-rel 18.84% / DDmax 6.07% / Sharpe 2.4263 / final EUR956,196.78 / nreb 42 / negY 0 to the euro.

Band-rule battery reproduction: mt5/reconcile/gbandrebal/ (sim.py, reproduce.py, gbandrebal_t1t2.py, engine_check.py -> reproduce.json/robustness.json; ~8.3 min deterministic engine run). Engine = sim.run_generic -> v51_bandharvest._run_window. Expected: incumbent 80.3%/17.31%/20.74%, BAND_SYM_25 89.7%/15.70%/19.44%, 31 triggers.

H8 rebalance science: mt5/reconcile/h8/{t1_measure,t2_synthetic,t3_blockshuffle,t4_measure,t5_knockouts,t6_frontier}.py + JSON results (t6 runtime 10.4 min, deterministic). Expected: quarterly-vs-none +26.36pp/+7.63pp; BAND_SYM_25 89.7/15.7 in T6.

MT5 real-tick canonical run: compile mt5/ea/PortfolioV7.mq5, preset mt5/presets/V7_CORE7BAND_R10_IC.set, IC-native symbols, real-tick model, 2020-01 -> 2026-06, EUR10k. Expected: 96.1% CAGR / 20.9% Maximal eqDD / 35.6% Relative eqDD / Sharpe 2.03 / ML floor 190% / 0 rejects / final ~EUR782k. Reconciliation vs Python reference per docs/v7/RECONCILIATION.md (verdict reconciled_with_notes; 0 unexplained mismatches).
R-frontier: mt5/reconcile/v76/rfrontier.py -> rfrontier.json / rfrontier_table.txt (panel, tick column anchored at R10 only); real tick numbers from PERFORMANCE.md reports _32-_37.

Rejected-extension artifacts (all deterministic, all reproduce the baseline exactly): V7.1 mt5/reconcile/v71/{rtradeoff,crisis_eval}.py; V7.2 mt5/reconcile/v72/combined.py; V7.4 mt5/reconcile/v74/{build_continuous,vx_study,hedge_sim,v74b_sim}.py (+ ../data/external/vx_contracts/, 168 CSVs); V7.5 mt5/reconcile/v75/ (evidence_pack, track_P/ED/REL, redteam_v1/v2, redteam_ruin.py); V7.6 mt5/reconcile/v76/{loo,carrier_hunt,hunt_gauntlet,skeptic_concentration}.py (bootstrap: 20d circular block, N=5000, seed 76); H14/H15 mt5/reconcile/h14/ + mt5/reconcile/h15/{build_baseline,tA_crisis_add,tB1_carry_replaces_s6,tB2_crisis_replaces_s6}.py; V8 mt5/reconcile/v8/{h1_build,h1_gate,qa_crisis_band,qb_lev_frontier,rc_ringfence}.py.

Hunt harnesses (locked): mt5/reconcile/fable_hunt/intraday/run_h5.py and events/run_h6.py (candidates as (label, inst, fn, kwargs) modules; hunters may not edit runners); honesty rules in mt5/reconcile/fable_hunt/HUNT_PROTOCOL.md.
official_numbers: V7.0 official headline = the MT5 REAL-TICK Strategy Tester run of PortfolioV7.mq5 (core7 + BAND_SYM_25 + H9 delta-resize, R=10, IC Markets EU Raw, EUR10k, 2020-01 -> 2026-06 crash-inclusive, worst-mark accounting): CAGR 96.1% / Max eqDD Maximal (EUR-worst) 20.9% / Max eqDD Relative (crisis %-worst, COVID) 35.6% (accepted <=40%) / Sharpe 2.03 / PF 1.67 / ML floor 190% / 0 volume rejects / 0-of-6 negative years / 3-of-24 losing quarters (2020Q1 −21.8%, 2021Q3 −1.4%, 2022Q4 −6.3%) / EUR10k -> ~EUR782,092 (docs/v7/PERFORMANCE.md + docs/v7/DASHBOARD.html; gates 4/5 + Sharpe>2 nice-to-have cleared). Two research-engine baselines coexist and must not be conflated: the Python close-mark BAND PANEL @ R10 (band_sim on h15/base_matrix.parquet): 108.50% CAGR / 18.84% DD-rel / 6.07% DDmax / Sharpe 2.426 / EUR956,197 / 42 rebalances — the selection baseline every post-V7.0 study reproduces to the euro; and the Python honest tick engine @ R8 (validated band book): 89.7% CAGR / 15.70% bd DD / 19.44% tick DD / Sharpe 2.58 / EUR532,230 — the battery configuration (7/7 hard gates, CPCV 15/15 median 85.9%). MT5 retains ~96% of Python CAGR at matched R8 (V6 was ~65-73%). The panel understates the COVID Relative tail ~0.53x (18.84 vs 35.6) and overstates CAGR/DD above R10 — TICK is the arbiter for any R>10 or schedule-affecting change.
pitfalls: Do NOT re-test the five rejected extensions: overlay ring as CAGR at EUR10k (funding-drag breakeven ~44-47% forward core CAGR — arithmetic, not backtest), VIX tail hedge (both structures adjudicated FAIL; only NEW-pre-registration tranche/option structures may reopen), energy tsmom carrier (0/15, one-event 2020 mirage; naked S6 drop FORBIDDEN at 20.65% DD-rel), FableMA2 imports (channel EXHAUSTED — md5-check any 'new' streams first; a third pass on the 7 byte-identical streams is pre-refused as p-hacking by installment), FM-1 intraday interception (pre-registered null, skeptic-confirmed).

T-B2 (crisis replaces S6, +1.35pp) is explicitly banned from re-litigation, resizing, tick-'confirmation', or citation as 'nearly there'. If S6's seat is ever re-examined, only pre-registered S6-removal (6-slot) or S6->HIGH-VOL candidate are licensed, each behind the fixed-schedule rebalance ablation falsifier.

The Python close-mark panel MISLEADS on anything schedule-affecting (debounce-3: +1.4pp panel vs −6.6pp tick) and is calibrated to tick ONLY at R10 (R12 panel DD overshoots +7.1pp; panel CAGR above R10 is 'fantasy' — real vol-target caps saturate). Any schedule- or sizing-affecting change owes an MT5 real-tick run.

H14's banked crisis +4.00pp / seasonal +1.43pp are CADENCE-CONDITIONAL (V6 quarterly + matched-DD re-lever) and INVERT on the V7.0 band book (−20.9pp raw / −23.4pp matched-DD). Do not 'cash' those numbers into any band-book design. Similarly CANDIDATE_CONFIG.md rev2's C2cfg (95.87%/14.71% unlevered R8 with overlay ring) is a superseded intermediate, not V7.0.

Backward-looking de-risking INVERTS on this book (RM search: −2 to −31pp; the convergent book is PAID for turbulence — high-VIX tercile is +27bp/day). Any trigger conditioned on book P&L/DD, vol level, or lagged prediction is graveyard. The only working de-risk sign is after GAINS (band/harvest, HWM direction) — and even HWM-delever failed as a CAGR lever (0/29 dominate R10).

Rebalance-timing chaos: EUR128 equity perturbation -> −EUR59k outcome shift; quarterly-offset noise is ±2-3pp CAGR; the band-book chaos band is ~1.0pp — single-path comparisons smaller than that are noise. Never move cash across the core account boundary mid-quarter; the core quarter-close is the only chaos-free transfer moment.

The re-split is LOAD-BEARING risk control (no-rebalance = 24.9% bd / 33.7% tick DD, through the goal): operational failure to re-split silently converts the book to its 33%-DD variant. min_gap_days=5 is part of the validated rule; the down-floor is sleeve-count-relative (W/1.75 — recompute if the enabled set changes); ship the band at up<=0.25 STRICTLY (tick DD breaches 20% at 0.28).
The DD-halving from re-splits is a slot-equity-sizing product (M2xM4): under fixed-notional sizing rebalancing RAISES DD (−7.31pp flip). Any change of sizing anchor voids the measured DD benefit.

2020-25 is fully mined; the holdout is consumed (V5.1's harvest was motivated by the Feb-2026 event). DEV/HOLD halves are an in-sample proxy only; live 2026H2+ is the only clean OOS and 'the demo is the experiment.' Every 2020-25 number carries the in-sample caveat.

Report BOTH MT5 DD metrics: Maximal (EUR-worst, ~R-invariant) AND Relative (%-worst crisis tail, scales sharply with R: R5 20.9 -> R10 35.6 -> R12 ~39). Quoting only Maximal flatters crisis risk. Losing quarters must be counted mark-to-market on the deployable real-tick run (3/24), not the Python close-mark (0).

Crisis-tail insurance economics at EUR10k: the crisis sleeve's protection is min-lot-killed exactly in 2020 (gold floor EUR1,751 > EUR1,250 slot; clear-frac 0.034) and the COVID tail is a min-lot + leverage artifact of a small early account that self-cures — it is NOT hedgeable cheaply (VIX gate confirmed; R-dial costs −29.7pp for −5.2pp).

Min-lot feasibility must be measured on ACTIVE-DAY ORDER notional, not time-averaged notional (rev-1's artifact), and core-seat slots COMPOUND (EUR1,250 in 2020 -> ~EUR26k in 2025) — static-slot arithmetic manufactures false infeasibility.

The C2 CPI calendar has look-ahead (61-of-71 scheduled dates selected ex-post on realized reaction; 2020: 2 of 12 kept) — any reuse of those event stats must re-derive from the ALL-SCHEDULED list. The EA v0.30 has a code-verified restart hole (C2-EURUSD overnight hold force-closes ~13-15h early after a post-midnight restart).

Known stale/superseded docs: CANDIDATE_CONFIG.md rev1 (archived, min-lot artifact); H14 sec.1 verdicts (superseded by stamped H15 addendum); ROADMAP.md's V7.2/V7.3/V7.4 plans (V7.4 since CLOSED; V7.5 superseded the V7.3 plan — drops F5, adds standdown; extended-history reconciliation PAUSED mid-diagnosis at 71%/44% vs real 108%/19%). The DASHBOARD (2026-07-10 11:07) is the latest consolidated state.

Swap model is reconstructed (validated vs IC MT5 actuals within ~0.3-0.7%/yr, but the largest model-risk in the cost stack); swaps are a first-order cost (V3.1 measured −15.6pp CAGR drag). USTEC/S6/BTC/overlay instruments are IC-only — no dual-feed cross-check exists (R5 risk; G-DUALFEED parked).
